news.headline: Global digital dentures market to reach USD 2.16 billion by 2029, with a 8.7% CAGR. driven by tech advancements.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 16, 2024, the worldwide market for digital dentures is anticipated to increase from USD 1.42 billion in 2024 to USD 2.16 billion by 2029, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.7% over this timeframe. The surge in market value is largely attributed to progressions in digital technologies...

news.headline: Amorphous and Nanocrystalline Core Market to Reach USD 804.9 million by 2030 with a CAGR of 19.1%.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of October 16, 2024, the market for amorphous and nanocrystalline cores is experiencing significant segmentation based on type, including Fe based, Iron Nickel based, Cobalt based, among others. The applications of these cores span across various sectors such as automobile, photovoltaic wind power, home appliances, computers, office equipment, and communications. This market trend indicates a growing diversity in core types and applications, reflecting the demand within industries for specialized solutions.

news.headline: SPX FLOW partners with HÆRFEST Coffee Roasting Co., offering mission-driven coffee in company marketplace and catered events. Founded by Toby Foreman in NC.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina, SPX FLOW revealed its collaboration with HÆRFEST Coffee Roasting Co. to provide its company marketplace and catered events with ethically sourced coffee. HÆRFEST, established by Toby Foreman in Davidson, NC, will be supplying its mission-driven coffee for this partnership.

news.headline: Krispy Krunchy Chicken® wows at 2024 NACS Show with 3,000 locations; serves 10,000 pounds at event.
news.summary: At the recent National Association of Convenience Stores (NACS) Show in Las Vegas, Krispy Krunchy Chicken® shined with over 3,000 locations, solidifying its position as a rapidly growing player in the convenience store food business. The event, which took place from October 8-10 at the Las Vegas Convention Center, saw the participation of key industry figures. Krispy Krunchy® stole the show by serving almost 10,000 pounds of its popular menu items.

news.headline: Italy may increase Bitcoin capital gains tax to 42% from 26% and eliminate 750 million euro revenue threshold for Digital Services Tax.
news.summary: The Italian government is looking to increase the tax on Bitcoin capital gains to 42% and eliminate the previous requirement of having a minimum revenue of 750 million euros for the Digital Services Tax.

news.headline: Elon Musk has influenced markets 6 times with his comments on Dogecoin.
Bitcoin surges to highest level in 2.5 months as Trump's lead grows, showing a correlation, industry experts note.
news.summary: Observers in the financial sector have noted a growing alignment between Bitcoin and the likelihood of former President Donald Trump winning.

news.headline: EigenLayer operators compete for restakers as P2P emphasizes revenue share to maintain top spot among validators.
news.summary: The P2P network is focused on maintaining its position as a top EigenLayer validator, prior to an upcoming increase in restaking rewards within the protocol.

news.headline: TON collaborates with Axelar to connect 68 blockchains in Web3 system. Axelar’s technology will enhance TON’s ecosystem.
news.summary: Axelar's technology, including the Interchain Amplifier and Mobius Development Stack, has the potential to introduce blockchain interoperability to TON's ecosystem. This advancement could significantly impact the integration and communication between different blockchains within TON, offering a more interconnected and seamless experience for users.

news.headline: DOGE sees 10% surge in price, fueling speculation of a "god candle" as memecoin traders flock to invest.
news.summary: In the last seven days, the price of DOGE experienced a significant increase, with a double-digit rally, as traders in the memecoin market opened new positions hoping for further growth.

news.headline: ESMA calls for changes to MiCA crypto rules after EC raised legal concerns, stressing key objectives. #EU #cryptocurrency.
news.summary: The European Securities and Markets Authority recognized the legal constraints highlighted by the European Commission, while underscoring the significance of the framework's original goals.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index 73/100 = Greed
Fear and Greed Index 68/100 = Greed
Ozarks Healthcare partners with Avo to integrate AI decision support into EHR, enhancing patient care.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in West Plains, Missouri, Ozarks Healthcare revealed a new collaboration with Avo, previously AvoMD, to incorporate Avo's cutting-edge AI clinical decision support platform into its MEDITECH Electronic Health Record (EHR) system. This partnership aims to enhance medical decision-making at Ozarks Healthcare, a prominent healthcare facility in the region.

news.headline: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.09 quarterly cash dividend, $0.36 annual rate, same as previous quarter.
news.summary: Today, in Catskill, NY, Greene County Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-GCBC) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.09 per share on its common stock. This equates to an annual cash dividend rate of $0.36 per share, consistent with the previous quarter. The Board of Directors approved this dividend announcement.

news.headline: Global Industrial Valve market to reach $121.67 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 4.9% from $95.58 billion in 2024.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects that the global Industrial Valve market is anticipated to reach USD 121.67 billion by 2029, showing growth from USD 95.58 billion in 2024. This indicates a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.9% during the forecast period. The industrial valve market is experiencing significant advancements and expansion.

news.headline: Spiders can be deadly - Pet experts warn Halloween bites can be fatal. Difficult to diagnose.
news.summary: Pet poison experts have issued a warning, stating that bites from common Halloween creatures like spiders can be fatal and hard to identify. The review of case data conducted by the experts at Pet Poison Helpline revealed the severity of the issue. The findings indicate that a significant number of cases involve bites that are difficult to diagnose, posing a serious threat to pets. The warning comes ahead of the Halloween season, reminding pet owners to be vigilant and take necessary precautions to protect their pets from potentially deadly bites.

news.headline: Global Combat Management System market expected to reach USD 29 billion by 2030 with an 11% CAGR. Rising defense budgets driving growth.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Lewes, Delaware, it was reported that the Combat Management System (CMS) market is experiencing significant growth. This growth is attributed to the rise in defense budgets worldwide, with a focus on countries looking to enhance their military technology. The increasing geopolitical tensions further contribute to the demand for advanced CMS. The market's expansion is notable, with numbers pointing towards a substantial increase in investments and procurement related to CMS technologies.

news.headline: myCIO Wealth Partners ranks 11th in America and 1st in Pennsylvania on Forbes Top RIA Firms List 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on Oct. 16, 2024, myCIO Wealth Partners shared their achievement of being ranked 11th nationally and securing the top position in Pennsylvania. This recognition comes from the Forbes/SHOOK Research list, where they stood out among 46,212 nominations for America's Top Registered Investment Advisory (RIA) Firms. This ranking underscores their commitment to excellence and client service in the financial industry.

news.headline: Huggies® is giving away baby bodysuits to promote safe sleep practices during Safe Sleep Awareness Month in October 2024.
news.summary: In an effort to promote safe sleep practices recommended by experts, a brand based in Chicago is distributing free baby bodysuits during October 2024, which is Safe Sleep and Sudden Infant Death Syndrome (SIDS) awareness month. The initiative by Kimberly-Clark U.S. aims to educate caregivers and raise awareness about safe sleep practices for infants.

news.headline: Feedonomics partners with YouTube for Shopping affiliate program, offering product listing and data optimization. Woodland Hills, Calif., Oct 16, 2024. (Source: PRNewswire)
news.summary: Feedonomics, based in Woodland Hills, California, revealed on October 16, 2024, their collaboration with YouTube Shopping affiliate merchants. The company, known for its expertise in product feed management for online retailers, will offer scalable solutions for optimizing product listings and data. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the performance of merchants on YouTube Shopping platform.

news.headline: Phoenix Tower Intl certified as Great Place To Work® in 10 markets. Global leader in wireless infrastructure. Oct 16, 2024.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on October 16, 2024, Phoenix Tower International (PTI), a prominent player in wireless communications infrastructure worldwide, has proudly disclosed its accreditation as a Great Place To Work® in 10 different markets. This prestigious acknowledgment is solely grounded on employee feedback and satisfaction.

news.headline: MyDirectives and National POLST Collaborative join to improve quality and accessibility of medical orders in US, aiming to help healthcare professionals create high-quality orders.
news.summary: A strategic agreement has been announced between MyDirectives, a prominent provider of digital advance care planning tools, and the National POLST Collaborative, a leading advocate for patient-centered portable medical orders. This collaboration aims to enhance the quality and accessibility of portable medical orders throughout the United States. By combining the capabilities of both entities, healthcare professionals will be empowered to develop and oversee top-notch, state-of-the-art solutions. This partnership is set to revolutionize the landscape of portable medical orders across the nation.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors Abhinav Shashank, CEO of Innovaccer, as a top entrepreneur at its summit. Exceptional leader in healthcare AI.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) has acknowledged Abhinav Shashank, the cofounder and CEO of Innovaccer, as one of the most exceptional entrepreneurs of 2024. This recognition took place at the Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg, California. Abhinav was chosen by Goldman Sachs as a standout leader from various industries for recognition at the two-day event. He is credited as the driving force behind Innovaccer, a prominent healthcare AI company based in San Francisco. Abhinav's dedication is centered on utilizing technology to innovate and improve healthcare services.

news.headline: Anthony Scaramucci criticizes Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial DeFi project as a "money scam" that investors should avoid at all costs. Scaramucci questions Trump's motives and warns of potential misuse of funds.
news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci criticized former President Donald Trump for involving himself in what he referred to as "nonsense" by launching the former president’s World Liberty Financial (WLFI) DeFi project. Speaking at the Stellar Meridian conference in London, Scaramucci warned that Trump is essentially using WLFI and his Truth Social platform as a means of generating revenue, describing it as a "money scam." He emphasized that Trump could potentially redirect funds for other purposes through this "transparent scam," advising investors to steer clear of it entirely. Scaramucci also questioned whether WLFI would resonate with crypto-oriented voters, expressing doubts about its appeal. It is suggested to refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: Southern California sees growth in new space hub, with significant economic impact and job creation.
New Dräger OXY SR Cap III provides rapid oxygen delivery for underground workers, NIOSH-certified for mining, lasts up to 10 years.
news.summary: A new rapid oxygen delivery system has been developed to aid workers in underground and confined spaces to escape hazardous conditions securely. The self-rescue device activates quickly to ensure immediate safety and is designed to endure harsh environments. It is certified by NIOSH for use in mining and industrial settings. The device can provide up to 10 years of reliable service.

news.headline: L.A. Works partners with Angel City FC to sponsor MLK Volunteer Festival in January at Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum.
news.summary: Los Angeles' largest nonprofit organization, L.A. Works, has announced plans for a National Women's Soccer League club to take action in support of the beloved community at the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum in January 2024. This initiative aims to bring together volunteers and supporters to make a positive impact.

news.headline: SYSPRO integrates with Adobe Commerce to share inventory, order, and customer data, enhancing e-commerce operations.
news.summary: Adobe Commerce has recently unveiled its integration with SYSPRO, a leading provider of industry-specific enterprise solutions. This integration allows Adobe Commerce to tap into crucial data from SYSPRO, including inventory, order, and customer statuses. By leveraging this integration, e-commerce operations are set to be bolstered, improving visibility and management across the board. This development was announced on October 16, 2024, in TUSTIN, Calif. Such a move is anticipated to fortify operations and enhance overall efficiency within Adobe Commerce.

news.headline: D.A. Davidson manages $29 million secondary offering for CPI Card Group Inc. on Nasdaq stock exchange.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was mentioned that D.A. Davidson & Co. acted as the exclusive manager for a secondary offering of common stock for CPI Card Group Inc. ("CPI"), a prominent payments technology firm specialized in credit, debit, and prepaid card services, as well as digital solutions like instant issuance through Software-as-a-Service (SaaS). CPI is publicly listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol PMTS. The company's core approach includes fostering individual connections and attaining noteworthy achievements in the industry.

news.headline: Three ships from a cruise line received low sanitation rankings from CDC.
Paytronix Gift Card Trend Report: Digital card sales up 7% YoY, revenue up 4%, with digital cards now 34% of total market.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Newton, Massachusetts, Paytronix released its highly anticipated 2024 Gift Card Trend Report. The report reveals that although the number of cards sold in 2023 remained consistent with 2022, there was a four percent increase in revenue from gift card sales year over year. Interestingly, among Paytronix clients, digital gift card sales saw a significant growth of 7% in 2023, now constituting 34% of the total gift card market and emerging as the fastest-growing segment.According to Lee Barnes, Paytronix's Chief Data Officer, restaurants are increasingly adopting digital gift cards to provide seamless purchasing, sending, redemption, and reloading experiences via mobile apps and websites. The shift towards digital gift cards as highlighted in the report emphasizes the importance of leveraging gift cards beyond just a sales tool to enhance customer engagement, expand brand reach, cultivate loyalty, and drive advocacy.For a comprehensive overview of the numbers and insights detailed in the 2024 Paytronix Gift Card Report, interested parties can download the report directly. This information signifies the growing trend and importance of digital gift cards in the hospitality industry.

news.headline: Western Alliance (NYSE: WAL) to release Q3 earnings on 2024-10-17, analysts expect EPS of $1.88. Investors optimistic for positive guidance.
news.summary: Before its quarterly earnings release on Thursday, October 17, 2024, Western Alliance (NYSE:WAL) is anticipated to report an EPS of $1.88 according to analysts. Investors are anticipating the announcement, eager for potential results that exceed expectations and optimistic guidance for the following quarter. This information highlights the anticipation surrounding Western Alliance's financial performance ahead of the official disclosure.

Previous quarters had positive EPS growth and share price increase, with shares trading at $94.1 and up 17.34% over 52 weeks. Analyst consensus rates the stock as Neutral. investors attentive to upcoming report and guidance effects.
news.summary: Crown Holdings (NYSE:CCK) is expected to report an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.80 for the upcoming quarter, with investors eagerly awaiting the announcement on October 17, 2024. In the previous quarter, the company beat EPS estimates by $0.23, leading to an 8.92% increase in share price the following day. Over the last year, Crown Holdings' stock has seen a 17.34% increase, with shares trading at $94.1 as of October 15. Analysts have given the company a "Neutral" rating, with 13 analyst ratings received in total. Market reactions are often influenced by guidance in addition to earnings performance. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Huntington Bancshares, listed on NASDAQ as HBAN, is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, October 17, 2024. The consensus among analysts is that the bank will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.30 for the quarter. Investors are eagerly awaiting this announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. The news is creating a buzz in the financial market as stakeholders keep a close eye on the numbers and projections. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

Investors are optimistic about the possibility of Iridium Comms surpassing estimates and offering positive guidance for the next quarter, which could impact stock prices. In the past quarter, the company exceeded EPS expectations by $0.10, leading to a 4.82% decrease in share price the following day. Over the last four quarters, the company's EPS estimates and actual performance have varied. The current share price for Iridium Comms stands at $30.07 with a 52-week decline of 24.22%, disappointing long-term shareholders. Analysts have given the company a consensus rating of Neutral. Understanding market sentiments and expectations is crucial for investors ahead of the earnings release.

news.headline: Marsh & McLennan (NYSE: MMC) to report EPS of $1.61 on 2024-10-17. Last quarter beat EPS by $0.01, share price dropped 0.31% next day. Trading at $226.06, share price is up 18.7% in the last 52-week period. Analysts provide insights and expectations.
news.summary: Marsh & McLennan (MMC) is set to release its earnings report on October 17, with analysts estimating an EPS of $1.61. Investors are eager for news of surpassing estimates and guidance for the next quarter. The company beat EPS by $0.01 last quarter, resulting in a 0.31% drop in share price the next day. Marsh & McLennan's stock was trading at $226.06 on October 15, with a 52-week increase of 18.7%. Analysts have given the company 7 ratings, emphasizing the importance of market sentiments and expectations for investors. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ManpowerGroup (NYSE: MAN) set to announce Q3 earnings on 2024-10-17. Analysts predict EPS at $1.29. Expectations high for results.
news.summary: ManpowerGroup (NYSE: MAN) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, October 17, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.29 for the company. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, optimistic that ManpowerGroup will exceed these expectations. Check out the full story on Benzinga.com for more details.

news.headline: Petfinder and Purina donate 330,000 EverRoot dog supplements to Greater Good Charities for National Pet Wellness Month.
news.summary: In St. Louis on October 16, 2024, Petfinder, in partnership with Purina, made a significant contribution to support shelter pets in the Seattle area during National Pet Wellness Month. Over 330,000 EverRoot dog supplements were donated to Greater Good in this initiative.

news.headline: OliverIQ launches multi-protocol hub for smart homes, offering affordable service. Oct. 16, 2024 - SOUTH JORDAN, Utah.
news.summary: A universal hub powered by artificial intelligence is revolutionizing smart home technology by offering cost-effective service and support. Headquartered in South Jordan, Utah, OliverIQ has introduced a Smart Home as a Service (SHaaS) platform to make smart home solutions accessible to the public. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, marking a significant step in the company's mission to democratize smart home intelligence.

news.headline: CarSaver introduces Boost Plus, aiming to increase dealer website leads, online conversions, and profits by over 50%.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on October 16, 2024, CarSaver introduced Boost+, an innovative tool for dealers that is free of charge. Boost+ aims to improve dealer website leads, online conversions, and profits substantially. This tool is available to participating dealers and has been designed to greatly enhance both the quantity and quality of leads generated.

news.headline: Global MUV Rental market estimated at $7.4B in 2023, expected to reach $21.4B by 2030 with a 16.3% CAGR growth.
news.summary: Dublin - A new report on global Multi Utility Vehicle (MUV) Rental has been unveiled by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for MUV Rental is valued at approximately US$7.4 Billion in 2023 and is anticipated to surge to US$21.4 Billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate of 16.3% during the forecast period from 2023 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market dynamics, trends, and projections to assist businesses in making well-informed decisions regarding the Multi Utility Vehicle Rental sector.

news.headline: NY public service campaign aims to promote organ donation amidst a statewide shortage. NY Metro has one of the lowest organ donor rates in the US.
news.summary: LiveOnNY has made a significant change to its iconic logo by removing the heart symbol to highlight the importance of organ donation. As of October 16, 2024, the greater New York Metro area records one of the lowest rates of organ donor registration in the United States, putting the burden of decision-making on family members for a significant number of individuals. This move emphasizes the critical need for individuals to register as organ donors to address this issue.

news.headline: Telemanipulators LLC resumes field service program after Covid-19 pandemic hiatus.
news.summary: The field service division of Telemanipulators LLC located in Cheyenne, Wyoming, has officially resumed operations on October 16, 2024, following a period of rebuilding post the Covid-19 Pandemic. The company is delighted to announce that they are now fully prepared to conduct on-site service visits once again. This news is a positive development after a hiatus caused by the pandemic, showcasing Telemanipulators LLC's commitment to providing timely and efficient service to its clientele.

news.headline: Motive launches Direct-to-Cell satellite connectivity, targeting remote areas. 570M adults lack network coverage.
news.summary: In Toronto, Motive Software Systems Inc, a top provider of entitlement services, has unveiled a new Direct-to-Cell satellite connectivity feature for mobile operators. This launch aims to simplify the delivery of services to underserved remote regions. Approximately 570 million individuals, which is equivalent to 8.7% of adults worldwide, reside in areas with limited to no access to mobile or internet services. This innovation is projected to address this issue by facilitating connectivity for operators, advancing accessibility in remote locations.

news.headline: Intelligence Factory launches OGAR to reduce AI hallucinations; aids healthcare, finance, aerospace.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on October 16, 2024, Intelligence Factory introduced OGAR (Ontology-Guided Augmented Retrieval), an advanced AI-powered data retrieval method designed to cater to the intricate data requirements of industries such as healthcare, finance, and aerospace. This innovative technique sets itself apart from traditional methods by offering a dynamic approach to extracting data.

news.headline: CalmWave improves bedside monitoring safety by reducing alarms. Successful pilot with Wellstar Health System leads to expanded program.
news.summary: In Seattle, a tech solution named CalmWave has conducted a successful proof-of-concept with Wellstar Health System. CalmWave aims to lessen non-actionable alarms using data science and AI. The collaboration has shown promise in improving the safety and effectiveness of bedside monitor vital sign alarms. Wellstar intends to scale up the pilot program by integrating the CalmWave Operations Platform. Additionally, Catalyst by Wellstar has strategically invested in this initiative.

news.headline: Trustate and SproutEd team up to offer trusts & estates CLE webinars for legal pros, filling knowledge gap in education.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Trustate, a top software provider for trusts and estates professionals, has partnered with SproutEd, a leading Continuing Legal Education (CLE) provider. This collaboration aims to offer high-quality trusts and estates CLE webinars to legal professionals. The partnership addresses the lack of education on trusts and estates in CLE programming. Trustate's expertise in software for trusts and estates professionals combined with SproutEd's specialization in CLE will provide legal professionals with valuable insights.

news.headline: OFN fully deploys $25M grant from Wells Fargo to support small business lenders, creating/saving 100,000 jobs across communities.
news.summary: The Finance Justice Fund by Opportunity Finance Network (OFN) has provided catalytic support to community development financial institutions across the nation, resulting in the creation or preservation of 100,000 jobs. As of October 16, 2024, OFN confirmed the effective distribution of $25 million towards this initiative.

news.headline: Corbel Capital Partners launches new equity fund for lower middle market companies, closes Corbel Equity Partners SBIC, L.P. with over $200 million.
news.summary: The private investment firm Corbel Capital Partners, based in Los Angeles, recently closed Corbel Equity Partners SBIC, L.P. ("CEP III"). This fund has raised over $200 million and aims to provide creative and flexible capital to lower middle market companies.
